title: palaquium grande
intro: Palaquium grande, also known as the Borneo Camphor or Malabar Camphor, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The medicinal properties of Palaquium grande include its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal agent. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as acne and wounds. Palaquium grande can be used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, ointments, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
